title: Pohlani Mata Temple
tagline: Pohlani Mata Temple — spiritual town of Himachal Pradesh

overview.short: Jai Pohlani Mata Temple is a Hindu temple for the deity Pohlani Mata.
overview.description: Jai Pohlani Mata Temple is a Hindu temple for the deity Pohlani Mata. It is located about 8.1 km away from Dalhousie, Himachal Pradesh, India. It includes a teahouse and great views of the Pir Pinjal range.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Khajjiar Lake
topPlaces.description: Khajjiar Lake is situated in Khajjiar, in Chamba district of Himachal Pradesh, India. It is situated at a height of around 1,951 m above sea level between Dalhousie and Chamba Town.

topPlaces.name: Khajjiar
topPlaces.description: Khajjiar is a hill station near the town of Chamba in Chamba district of Himachal Pradesh, India. Located approximately 24 kilometres (15 mi) from Dalhousie, it lies on a small plateau about 2,000 meters (6,500 feet) above sea level in the foothills of the Dhauladhar ranges in the Western Himalayas.

topPlaces.name: Kalatop Khajjiar Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Kalatop Khajjiar Sanctuary, or simply Kalatop Sanctuary, is a 30.69 km2 animal sanctuary at Kalatop and Khajjiar in the Chamba district of Himachal Pradesh, India. The sanctuary area is well laid out for trekking trails both at Kalatop and Khajjiar.

topPlaces.name: Dalhousie Cantonment
topPlaces.description: Dalhousie cantonment is a town in Dalhousie, just 50 km from Chamba town in Chamba district in the state of Himachal Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: Dalhousie, India
topPlaces.description: Dalhousie (Hindi pronunciation: [ɖəlɦɔːziː]) is a hill station, near the town of Chamba in Chamba district in the Indian state of Himachal Pradesh. It is situated across five hills and has an elevation of 1,970 m (6,460 ft) above sea level.

topPlaces.name: Dhauladhar
topPlaces.description: Dhauladhar (Hindi: धौलाधार) (lit. 'The White Range') is a mountain range which is part of a lesser Himalayan chain of mountains in northern India. It rises from the Shivalik hills, to the north of Kangra and Mandi.

topPlaces.name: Chamrauli, Chamba
topPlaces.description: Chamrauli is a village located in Chamba Tehsil of Chamba district in Himachal Pradesh, India. It is situated 19 km away from Chamba, which is both district & sub-district headquarter of Chamrauli village.

topPlaces.name: Banikhet
topPlaces.description: Banikhet is located about seven kilometers from Dalhousie, India. It is an important centre of tourism in the Chamba district.

items.note: Khajjiar Lake is situated in Khajjiar, in Chamba district of Himachal Pradesh, India. It is situated at a height of around 1,951 m above sea level between Dalhousie and Chamba Town.

Khajjiar is a hill station near the town of Chamba in Chamba district of Himachal Pradesh, India. Located approximately 24 kilometres (15 mi) from Dalhousie, it lies on a small plateau about 2,000 meters (6,500 feet) above sea level in the foothills of the Dhauladhar ranges in the Western Himalayas.

Kalatop Khajjiar Sanctuary, or simply Kalatop Sanctuary, is a 30.69 km2 animal sanctuary at Kalatop and Khajjiar in the Chamba district of Himachal Pradesh, India. The sanctuary area is well laid out for trekking trails both at Kalatop and Khajjiar.
Dalhousie cantonment is a town in Dalhousie, just 50 km from Chamba town in Chamba district in the state of Himachal Pradesh, India.

Dalhousie (Hindi pronunciation: [ɖəlɦɔːziː]) is a hill station, near the town of Chamba in Chamba district in the Indian state of Himachal Pradesh. It is situated across five hills and has an elevation of 1,970 m (6,460 ft) above sea level.

Dhauladhar (Hindi: धौलाधार) (lit. 'The White Range') is a mountain range which is part of a lesser Himalayan chain of mountains in northern India. It rises from the Shivalik hills, to the north of Kangra and Mandi.

Chamrauli is a village located in Chamba Tehsil of Chamba district in Himachal Pradesh, India. It is situated 19 km away from Chamba, which is both district & sub-district headquarter of Chamrauli village.
Banikhet is located about seven kilometers from Dalhousie, India. It is an important centre of tourism in the Chamba district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Pohlani Mata Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Pohlani Mata Temple is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Pohlani Mata Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kangra Airport (Gaggal), Dharamshala (45 km) and the nearest railway station is Jammu Tawi (112 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Pohlani Mata Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Pohlani Mata Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Pohlani Mata Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Pohlani Mata Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Pohlani Mata Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Khajjiar Lake, Khajjiar, Kalatop Khajjiar Sanctuary, Dalhousie Cantonment, Dalhousie, India.
